title: Count HTTP Status Codes
description: Parse an Nginx access log and count occurrences of each HTTP status code. The status code is the 9th space-separated field (1-indexed) in each log line. Return a dictionary mapping integer status codes to their counts.
constraints: Status code is the 9th space-separated field in each log line
Return an empty dict for empty input
Status codes are integers in the returned dict
Lines with fewer than 9 fields should be skipped

examples.explanation: Two requests returned 200 OK and one returned 404 Not Found.

starter_code.python:
def count_status_codes(log_content: str) -> dict[int, int]:
    pass

#!/bin/bash
# Read log from stdin, output status code counts
